# Adham Ehab

Mechatronics engineer working in embedded systems, real-time control, and IoT.

Ain Shams University, B.Sc. Mechatronics Engineering (2026). Currently an Embedded Systems & IoT Intern at Lotus Power. Previously a firmware and embedded systems engineer on ASU ROAR's rover team, finishing Top 20 of 125 teams at the European Rover Challenge 2025.

## Projects

**CoTune Remote Control Laboratory** — [GitHub](https://github.com/AdhamEhab14/CoTune-Remote-Control-Lab) · [Website](https://main.d35sofljaoe99e.amplifyapp.com/) · [Demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JONjcuDR5eo)
Graduation project: a remote-access control systems lab across 4 live testbeds on ESP32/FreeRTOS/AWS IoT Core, streaming telemetry and video at sub-1s latency. State-feedback LQR control and multi-rate Kalman filtering, with an Augmented EKF digital twin reaching 2.6× the estimation accuracy of the nominal model.

**Smart Beehive IoT Node & Telemetry Dashboard** — [GitHub](https://github.com/AdhamEhab14/Smart-Beehive-IoT-Node)
Dual-priority FreeRTOS architecture on ESP32 that separates a 500ms local display loop from a 5s MQTT-over-TLS telemetry pipeline, with a Flutter + Firebase dashboard for live monitoring and remote actuator control.

**Low-Level Peripheral Drivers — PIC18 & STM32** — [GitHub](https://github.com/AdhamEhab14/PIC18-STM32-Peripheral-Drivers)
Register-level, bare-metal peripheral drivers for the PIC18F46K20 and STM32F103RB, reused across 5+ projects.

## Skills

**Embedded & firmware:** C / Embedded C, C++, bare-metal, FreeRTOS, HAL/LL, AUTOSAR, MISRA-C
**Microcontrollers:** STM32 (Cortex-M0/M3/M4), ESP32, PIC
**Protocols:** CAN, LIN, UART, SPI, I2C, One-Wire
**IoT & cloud:** AWS IoT Core, MQTT/MQTTS, Firebase, HTTP
**Tools:** Altium Designer, EasyEDA, STM32CubeIDE, MPLAB X, JTAG/SWD, Git
